State.Name: Spotlight State
State.Hint: Persistent shared state for Claim the Moment.

Countdown.Name: Spotlight Countdown
Countdown.Hint: How many seconds players have to claim the spotlight before it is assigned automatically.

SoundEnabled.Name: Play Throw Alert
SoundEnabled.Hint: Play the shared cinematic alert for everyone when the GM throws the spotlight.

SoundPath.Name: Throw Alert Sound
SoundPath.Hint: Choose or upload the audio file played when the spotlight is thrown.

PlayerClaimSoundEnabled.Name: Play Player Claim Horn
PlayerClaimSoundEnabled.Hint: Play a shared heroic horn when a player claims the spotlight before time expires.

PlayerClaimSoundPath.Name: Player Claim Horn
PlayerClaimSoundPath.Hint: Choose or upload the heroic audio file played when a player claims the spotlight.

AutoSelectSoundEnabled.Name: Play Automatic Selection Cue
AutoSelectSoundEnabled.Hint: Play a shared cue when the countdown expires and the system selects a player automatically.

AutoSelectSoundPath.Name: Automatic Selection Cue
AutoSelectSoundPath.Hint: Choose or upload the audio file played when the system automatically selects a player.

GMTakeSoundEnabled.Name: Play GM Danger Horn
GMTakeSoundEnabled.Hint: Play a shared foreboding horn when the GM takes the spotlight.

GMTakeSoundPath.Name: GM Danger Horn
GMTakeSoundPath.Hint: Choose or upload the danger audio file played when the GM takes the spotlight.

GMIcon.Name: GM Spotlight Icon
GMIcon.Hint: Choose or upload the image shown when the GM takes the spotlight.

MuteSounds.Name: Mute Claim the Moment Sounds
MuteSounds.Hint: Your personal mute preference for this world.

SoundVolume.Name: Claim the Moment Volume
SoundVolume.Hint: Your personal Claim the Moment playback volume for this world.

Status.OpenHint: The first eligible player to claim wins the spotlight.
Status.AutomaticWinner: No one claimed in time, so the fairest next player was selected.
Status.HandedWinner: The GM handed them the moment directly.
Status.ClaimedWinner: They reached for the moment first.
Status.GMTakenWinner: The GM has taken the spotlight to move the scene forward.
Status.ReadyHint: The GM can throw it to the table when the next moment opens.
Status.NoWinnerHint: Bring at least one online player into contention, then throw again.

Actions.ThrowHint: Players' windows open automatically when the countdown begins.
Actions.GMActionHint: Throw it to the players, or take it immediately to move the scene forward.
Actions.ClaimHint: Only the first eligible claim is counted.

Roster.Title: Online Players
Roster.HandSpotlight: Hand the spotlight directly to this player
Roster.ToggleTooltip: Include or exclude this player from the spotlight

GMTools.Title: GM controls
GMTools.Hint: Set contention, edit a total directly, or reset every player to zero.

Reset.Title: Reset Spotlight Claims
Reset.Confirm: Reset every player's spotlight claim total to zero? This cannot be undone.

Notifications.GMRequired: An active GM is required to manage the spotlight.
Notifications.NoEligiblePlayers: At least one eligible player must be online before throwing the spotlight.
Notifications.NoEligibleAtDeadline: The countdown ended with no eligible players online.
Notifications.OperationFailed: Claim the Moment could not complete that action. Check the console for details.
